theme.primary_concept: High-Contrast Swiss Medical - A fusion of clinical cleanliness with bold typography and organic deep crimson accents. It must look trustworthy, modern, and highly polished for a job interview portfolio.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, high contrast. Use font-light for large headings and font-bold for emphasis.

layouts.hero: min-h-[80vh] flex flex-col justify-center bg-surface relative overflow-hidden

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), bold text, transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg active:translate-y-0. Primary: bg-[#b91c1c] text-white. Secondary: bg-white text-[#1c1917] border border-[#e7e5e4].
components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-[#e7e5e4]), no default shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.forms: Use standard Shadcn forms but customize inputs to have bg-[#f5f5f4], rounded-lg, focus:ring-[#b91c1c] focus:border-[#b91c1c].
components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-[#e7e5e4]/50.

motion.entrance: Fade in and slide up (framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }})
motion.stagger: Delay child animations by 0.1s for lists.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract red liquid waves - use as a subtle, low-opacity background texture or banner image in the hero section.

hero_main.description: Woman holding heart shaped stethoscope - represents care and life.

donation_process.description: Men donating blood - use in the 'Become a Donor' or 'About' section.

medical_consult.description: Doctor showing tablet - use in the 'Request Blood' or 'Search Blood' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500&family=Outfit:wght@300;500;700&display=swap');
Apply 'Outfit' to headings and 'Manrope' to body globally in tailwind configuration.
Implement the landing page with a clear Hero section, a statistics banner, and an 'Action' bento grid mapping to the 3 main user paths: Register as Donor, Search/Find Blood, Request Blood.
For the 'Search/Find Blood' feature, create a clean form with Blood Group and City dropdowns, followed by a list/grid of dummy donor results.
For 'Request Blood' and 'Become a Donor', create elegant forms using Shadcn UI. Style inputs with a solid light gray background and subtle borders.
Include an 'Admin-style list of donors' section on a separate route or a prominent section on the homepage, displaying donors in a dense, clean Shadcn Table.
The header MUST have a navigation bar linking to Home, Find Blood, Request Blood, Register, Contact, and Donors. It must use a Crystal Glassmorphism effect.
Use Lucide-React for all icons. Icons should be crisp and stroke-width 1.5.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Do NOT center-align massive blocks of text.
The overall vibe should be highly professional, suited for a job interview portfolio, showing strong mastery of white space, layout asymmetry, and color discipline.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' outputs.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
DO NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions to specific properties like transform and opacity.
DO NOT center align the app container in App.css.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped.
Never use AI assistant Emojis for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
Use generous spacing (2-3x more than usual) to prevent a cramped look.
